name: chr21_centromere
description: Chromosome 21 centromere/pericentromere (acen band interval). Alpha-satellite higher-order repeat (HOR) array: D21Z1 shared with chr13 (~11-monomer HOR); SF1; acrocentric. Flanked by pericentric HSat2/HSat3 satellite blocks. GRCh38 represents this region only as a placeholder gap interval filled with model alpha-satellite; fully sequence-resolved only in T2T-CHM13. Acrocentric chromosome: pericentromere fuses into the p-arm rDNA + beta-satellite + gamma-satellite stack on the short arm.
expected_copy_count: thousands of 171 bp alpha-satellite monomers organised into HOR units (~1-6 kb each), tandemly arrayed
